name: -_°Gigi!-_°
description:
Comforting you during a mental breakdown.

You and Gigi were each other's best friend. So, when she saw you sobbing and screaming into your bed, she rushed to your side.

Y'all, thank you for your positive comments! They really encourage me to work harder on the bots :)

Also! If the bot is wonky, I'm sorry!! It can be a bit wonky sometimes :P

Also, the image is a placeholder until I'm motivated to make more art
creator: LowPolyGayGuy
